summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This enum defines a set of file system counters.

CORE LOGIC:

This enum does not contain any logic.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

This enum does not define any inputs or outputs.

DEPENDENCIES:

This enum does not depend on any other classes or packages.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- The class provides a common implementation for the Counters container in both mapred and mapreduce packages.
- It includes methods for adding groups, finding counters, and incrementing multiple counters by their amounts in another Counters instance.

CORE LOGIC:
- The class uses a cache from enum values to the associated counter to optimize performance.
- It also includes a method for writing the set of groups to a DataOutput.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The class takes a CounterGroupFactory as a parameter in its constructor, which is used to create new groups.
- It also takes a Limits object as a parameter, which is used to check the limits of the number of groups and counters.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The class depends on the CounterGroupFactory and Limits classes.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This class provides a common implementation of the filesystem counter group in both mapred and mapreduce packages.

CORE LOGIC:

The class initializes a map to store the file system counters and provides methods to add, find, and increment counters. It also provides methods to read and write the counters to/from a DataInput/DataOutput stream.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The class takes a DataInput and DataOutput stream as input/output for reading/writing the counters.

DEPENDENCIES:

The class depends on the Counter and FileSystemCounter classes.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

This class provides a framework for implementing counter groups in both mapred and mapreduce packages. It includes methods for adding, finding, and incrementing counters, as well as reading and writing counter data.

CORE LOGIC:

The class includes a counter facade for framework counters, which allows for compatibility between old and new interfaces. It also includes methods for adding, finding, and incrementing counters, as well as reading and writing counter data.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The class takes in a class object representing the counter enum class, and provides methods for adding, finding, and incrementing counters. It also includes methods for reading and writing counter data.

DEPENDENCIES:

The class depends on the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.counters package and the org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.util package. It also depends on the org.apache.hadoop.io package for reading and writing counter data.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- Helper class to handle resource bundles in a saner way

CORE LOGIC:
- Get a resource bundle
- Get a resource given bundle name and key

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- Resource bundle name
- Resource key
- Default value for the resource

DEPENDENCIES:
- java.util.Locale
- java.util.ResourceBundle
- java.util.MissingResourceException
